title: Quickselect worst case: n(n-1)/2 comparisons
statement_informal: Quickselect (Hoare's FIND) performs at most n(n-1)/2 comparisons in the worst case.

cost_model.notes: Each partition uses n-1 comparisons; the worst case (extreme pivot) recurses on n-1.

references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 3 §5.3.3 — selection; FIND. (Average case is linear — a harder unit.)
